notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Bryce Harper out at 1st.
